description_long: This is a large, rectangular red-brick apartment building surrounded by a gray perimeter fence, featuring two main stories and a flat roof. The front facade is symmetrical, with a central entrance flanked by two garage doors and several large windows, and a decorative sign above the main door. The rear of the building opens onto a spacious yard with a swimming pool, a round above-ground pool, and a children's play area with swings. The building has multiple windows arranged in regular rows, and a prominent bay window section on one side. The roof is flat and accessible, with some rooftop structures and railings visible. The property is accessed through a double-gated driveway, and the overall design is functional and modern, with minimal ornamentation.
description: A large, red-brick apartment building with a flat roof, symmetrical windows, and a fenced yard featuring pools and a play area. The main entrance is central, with garages and a decorative sign, and the building is surrounded by a gray fence.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, two garage doors, a decorative sign, and symmetrical window arrangement.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the driveway, garage access, and the flat roof with rooftop structures.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the backyard with a swimming pool, round pool, bay window, and children's play area.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the play area, pools, and the building's side windows and rooftop features.
attribute_window_arrangement: Windows are symmetrically arranged in horizontal rows across all facades, with regular spacing and some grouped in pairs or sets. The bay window section on one side adds visual interest and breaks the uniformity.
